name: superpowers
description: Discipline lane. Route here when CORRECTNESS governs and getting it wrong is expensive: writing code test-first, finding a bug's root cause before fixing, verifying a 'done' claim with evidence, reviewing a specific diff, or turning a chosen direction into a rigorous step-by-step plan. It governs HOW you work on code — NOT a document/slide/image domain (those are installed skills), and NOT raw parallel throughput or autonomous looping (that is oh-my-claudecode).

skills.name: discipline-lane
skills.description: Representative signals that route to superpowers (the session then picks the exact SP skill).
examples: write this feature test-first / make the failing test pass
about to fix a bug — find the root cause first, don't guess
verify this is actually done/correct before we ship
send a reviewer over this specific diff
turn this chosen direction into a step-by-step plan
이 버그 고치기 전에 근본 원인부터
어떤 방향이 나을지 비교 (no direction yet)
